title: Analyzing the Potential Market for MSMEs in India

summary.about: Which products and foreign markets offer the strongest export opportunities for Indian MSMEs.
summary.audience: MSME owners, export agencies and Indian trade policymakers.
summary.method: Combines RCA, RTA, market-demand and export-potential indicators with GTAP estimates for 2022–27.
summary.insights: Strong opportunities appear in textiles, food, agriculture and machinery, especially in the UAE, China, Bangladesh and the United States.
